tasks.label: build active C file
args: if [ "$(basename "${fileDirname}")" = "src" ]; then list_dir="${fileDirname}/.."; srcs=("${file}"); for helper in "${fileDirname}"/*.c; do [ "$helper" = "${file}" ] && continue; grep -q "int main" "$helper" && continue; srcs+=("$helper"); done; else list_dir="${fileDirname}/../.."; srcs=("${fileDirname}"/*.c); fi; mkdir -p "$list_dir/build"; shopt -s nullglob; if [ -d "$list_dir/base" ]; then srcs+=("$list_dir"/base/*.c); fi; includes=("-I${fileDirname}"); if [ -d "$list_dir/base" ]; then includes+=("-I$list_dir/base"); fi; clang "${srcs[@]}" "${includes[@]}" -g -o "$list_dir/build/${fileBasenameNoExtension}"

tasks.label: run active C file
args: if [ "$(basename "${fileDirname}")" = "src" ]; then list_dir="${fileDirname}/.."; srcs=("${file}"); for helper in "${fileDirname}"/*.c; do [ "$helper" = "${file}" ] && continue; grep -q "int main" "$helper" && continue; srcs+=("$helper"); done; else list_dir="${fileDirname}/../.."; srcs=("${fileDirname}"/*.c); fi; mkdir -p "$list_dir/build"; shopt -s nullglob; if [ -d "$list_dir/base" ]; then srcs+=("$list_dir"/base/*.c); fi; includes=("-I${fileDirname}"); if [ -d "$list_dir/base" ]; then includes+=("-I$list_dir/base"); fi; clang "${srcs[@]}" "${includes[@]}" -g -o "$list_dir/build/${fileBasenameNoExtension}" && "$list_dir/build/${fileBasenameNoExtension}"
